subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1914-12-22
subcodes.first_line: When I was a very little child in Teheran it became necessary and urgent that I should carry a message of great importance to the General of the army
subcodes.subjects: @youth and pre-ministry of Abdu'l-Baha, @stories; anecdotes, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha
